CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RANDALL GO OD BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-23-2014 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SERVICE O.D, LINCOLN A. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST RANDALL GO, OD IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
